title: scutellaria orichalcea
intro: Scutellaria orichalcea, also known as yellow skullcap, is a perennial plant in the mint family that is native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Scutellaria orichalcea include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. The herbal preparations of Scutellaria orichalcea include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
